title: elatostema filicoides var. eufilicoides
intro: Elatostema filicoides var. eufilicoides, also known as the umbrella fern, is a type of flowering plant in the nettle family that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Elatostema filicoides var. eufilicoides include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction, infusion, or topical application, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
